name: outbox.build_pull_request
description: Build a provider-agnostic draft pull-request packet and outbox entry from native scafld surfaces.

task_id.description: scafld task id that produced the completed engineering state.

thread_title.description: Canonical thread title when the caller already has one.

thread_locator.description: Canonical thread locator for the bounded work item.

thread.description: Optional hydrated thread that may already carry a pull_request outbox entry.

outbox_entry.description: Optional current pull_request outbox entry when refreshing an existing draft.

target_repo.description: Intended repository slug when the caller already knows it.

summary_projection.description: Native scafld summary result payload from `scafld summary --json`.

checks_projection.description: Native scafld checks result payload from `scafld checks --json`.

pr_body_projection.description: Native scafld pr-body result payload from `scafld pr-body --json`.

status_snapshot.description: Native scafld status result payload for sync and origin facts.
